channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: President Trump shares a new reason why the U.S. attacked Iran - NPR
item.description:
1. President Trump shares a new reason why the U.S. attacked Iran  NPR
  2. The rationale for striking Iran was already a mess. Trump just made it worse.  CNN
  3. The Trump administration still can’t decide why it’s doing this  vox.com
  4. Trump Letter to Congress Justifying Iran Strikes Outlines No Imminent Threat  The New York Times
  5. Following Iran strikes, Trump floods news outlets with one-on-one calls  The Washington Post

item.title: Trump says Starmer is 'no Winston Churchill' over Iran strikes - BBC
item.description:
1. Trump says Starmer is 'no Winston Churchill' over Iran strikes  BBC
  2. Trump on Starmer: 'Not Winston Churchill that we're dealing with'  BBC
  3. Trump rebukes Starmer again for not letting US attack Iran from UK bases  The Guardian
  4. War with Iran strains the US-UK relationship as Starmer and Trump disagree  AP News
  5. Trump lambasts UK’s Starmer, Spain over Iran  The Hill

item.title: Israeli military says Iranian missiles hit central Israel - Reuters
item.description:
1. Israeli military says Iranian missiles hit central Israel  Reuters
  2. Israel steps up airstrikes in Tehran, as Iran widens its response across the region  AP News
  3. Middle East crisis live: US military says it has hit more than 1,700 targets since it began war on Iran  The Guardian
  4. Everything we know on day 4 of the US and Israel’s war with Iran  CNN
  5. Dispatch from Tehran: Nowhere feels safe from attack  NBC News

item.title: China calls for vessels in strait of Hormuz to be protected amid soaring shipping costs - The Guardian
item.description:
1. China calls for vessels in strait of Hormuz to be protected amid soaring shipping costs  The Guardian
  2. You may pay more for gas after Iran closes Strait of Hormuz oil route  USA Today

  4. China Calls on All Sides to Protect Ships Transiting Hormuz  Bloomberg

item.title: Greece, France and Germany send forces to Cyprus after drone strikes - Euronews.com
item.description:
1. Greece, France and Germany send forces to Cyprus after drone strikes  Euronews.com

  5. UK, France send warships, air defence assets to Cyprus after drone attack  Al Jazeera

item.title: CIA station in Saudi capital hit in drone attack - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. CIA station in Saudi capital hit in drone attack  The Washington Post

item.title: Trump's Iran attack rattles Russian hardliners who call for Putin to double down on war in Ukraine - Reuters
item.description:
1. Trump's Iran attack rattles Russian hardliners who call for Putin to double down on war in Ukraine  Reuters

  3. What the Iran conflict means for Russia  Lowy Institute
  4. Putin won’t benefit from a surge in oil prices  The Telegraph
  5. Putin Is the Iran War’s One Sure Winner  Bloomberg

item.title: Trump threatens to cut off trade with Spain over air bases - Politico
item.description:
1. Trump threatens to cut off trade with Spain over air bases  Politico

item.title: Iran continues to hit back at US-Israeli strikes as Trump says it is too late to talk - The Guardian
item.description: Iran continues to hit back at US-Israeli strikes as Trump says it is too late to talk  The GuardianView Full Coverage on Google News

item.title: Iran conflict escalates: 6 U.S. service members killed as death toll climbs - Axios
item.description:

item.title: US nationals urged to leave Middle East as conflict spreads - BBC

item.description:

item.title: UAE considers striking Iranian missile sites as regional war spreads - Axios

item.title: Iran’s Strategy: Expand the War, Increase the Cost, Outlast Trump - The New York Times
item.description:
